label: session-started
context: Mention Demo session open in conductor mode

label: input-focused
context: Message input focused, about to type @mention

label: at-sign-typed
context: At-sign typed, voice picker dropdown opened

label: voice-selected
context: Anthropic voice selected from picker, input shows @mention tag

label: message-composed
context: Full directed message composed targeting Anthropic

label: voice-responded
context: Anthropic responded to the directed question
